reviews.review_title: A Must Play For Horror Game Fans!!
reviews.review_description: I’ve played this game, and its really fun. The starting area is a bit terrifying, but once you get used to it, the game becomes very enjoyable. Those who’ve played Outlast will definitely get similar vibes.

developer_response.body: Thanks for playing! We’re happy you enjoyed the game.

reviews.review_description: After playing this game, I could tell its a great experience. The atmosphere is spooky but not too scary, and the puzzles make it really enjoyable. A well made and fun game overall. I choose to play without the chainsaw guy. 😹
